General.Name: Namib Minerals Ordinary Shares
General.Description: Namib Minerals operates as a gold producer in Africa and Democratic Republic of Congo. The company owns and operates How Mine, Mazowe Mine, and Redwing Mine located in Zimbabwe, Africa. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands. Namib Minerals is a subsidiary of The Southern SelliBen Trust.
General.Address: Suite 210, Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands, KY1-1106
